import json, os, sys, re, unicodedata, itertools, statistics, math, difflib

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"
import json, os, sys, re, unicodedata, itertools, math, difflib, statistics
len(os.listdir("/mnt/data")), os.path.getsize(quran_path), os.path.getsize(hadith_path)

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
type(quran), len(quran), quran[0].keys()

def normalize_arabic(s):
    # remove tashkeel and tatweel
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch)[0] != 'M')  # remove marks
    # remove tatweel U+0640
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # unify alef forms 
    s = re.sub('[إأٱآا]', 'ا', s)
    # unify taa marbuta? keep maybe
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # unify hamza on waw/ya? Keep hamza? For now remove hamzas
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # remove punctuation and non letters
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u064A\s]', ' ', s)
    # normalize spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def score_similarity(a, b):
    na, nb = normalize_arabic(a), normalize_arabic(b)
    sm = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, na, nb)
    return sm.ratio()

target_snippet = "وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ"
target_snippet_norm = normalize_arabic(target_snippet)
target_snippet_norm[:200], len(target_snippet_norm)

# search quran for substring matches and compute similarity
candidates = []
for v in quran:
    ay = v['ayah_text']
    # compute similarity both ways
    sim = score_similarity(ay, target_snippet)
    if sim > 0.4 or normalize_arabic(ay) in target_snippet_norm or target_snippet_norm in normalize_arabic(ay):
        candidates.append((sim, v))
        
# sort
candidates_sorted = sorted(candidates, key=lambda x: -x[0])
candidates_sorted[:5][0][0], candidates_sorted[:5][0][1] if candidates_sorted else None

# find 65:3 as well
v65_3 = [v for v in quran if v['surah_id']==65 and v['ayah_id']==3][0]
v65_3

ayah2 = v65_2['ayah_text']
ayah3 = v65_3['ayah_text']
phrase1 = "وَمَنْ يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَلْ لَهُ مَخْرَجًا"
phrase2 = "وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ"

# find them programmatically
i1 = ayah2.find(phrase1)
i2 = ayah3.find(phrase2)
i1, i2, ayah2[i1:i1+len(phrase1)], ayah3[i2:i2+len(phrase2)]

original_span = "وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ"
candidate = phrase1 + " " + phrase2
score_similarity(original_span, candidate), candidate

len(hadith_matches)
